2075439615134060926.full_text:
🚨 Rachin Ravindra Believes MS Dhoni Is More Famous Than Cristiano Ronaldo 🚨

Rachin said :

I was lucky enough to visit Portugal and Spain recently. It reminded me of the incredible fanfare around Cristiano Ronaldo, but honestly, I believe MS Dhoni's is even greater. The noise whenever Dhoni appears, whether on TV, walking out to warm up, or entering the stadium, is simply next level. 

The whistles, cheers, and pure emotion from the crowd are unlike anything I've seen. Even at airports, the scenes are unbelievable. Everything has to be cordoned off, he often has to use a separate route, and people constantly try to film him. 

On flights, passengers spend the entire journey recording him, even if it's just the back of his head. What I admire most is that despite all this attention, Dhoni remains humble, down-to-earth, and incredibly knowledgeable about the game. [Wisden Cricket]

2075420862510211400.full_text: Ajit Agarkar's hate for Sanju Samson will not only ruin Sanju Samson's career, but it will also take Gautam Gambhir's and Shreyas Iyer's jobs down with it.🤡🤡 https://t.co/ipS1FD6Xw6

2075417503275401623.full_text:
Every match in this ENG vs IND series reminds me just how priceless Sanju Samson's 89 in the semifinal was. 😭🔥

We never thanked him enough for that innings. On a challenging day, he played the defining knock that carried India to 250+, giving the bowlers something to defend. And the way he took on Jofra Archer under pressure completely shifted the momentum. That innings deserves far more appreciation than it gets. 🥶🔥

2075404883033993562.full_text: If India is serious about its T20I future, Tilak Varma shouldn't be on the Zimbabwe tour. Bring back Sanju Samson and make him the vice-captain. Ignore proven performers again, and don't be surprised if India ends up losing the Zimbabwe series too.🤡 https://t.co/NCfArQmixr
